In this social networking traffic video we're going to be looking at the site photolog.com that's F-O-T-O-L-O-G, photolog.com. The reason why this is a great site for you to be using for traffic is it is an image site so you can be uploading and sharing photos with people and creating groups, having friends, inviting them. As you can see here it's joined more than 18.8 for 4 million members worldwide. So there's a lot of people, a lot of activity on this website. It's got a high Alexa ranking, it's got a great page rank and people are adding photos to this site all the time. Now it's not perhaps something that jumps to mind when it comes to driving traffic to your site. People don't always think about using just photos but with photos as it says you know an image creates a thought, covers a thousand words. You can say a lot with images especially in certain niche markets and by having people looking at your photos they can either be serious photos about your niche or they could be funny photos that attract people to spread the word virally and get people to your site. And once people actually click and look at your photos you can encourage them to join things like RSS feeds so that whilst once you update more images they're told to come back to the site to check for more and that's the way it's virally going to help you get the word out there. It's easy to join and once I've joined there's another little part of the site that I want to show you that's really cool that is going to be something you can make use of that they've added that's a fantastic function within Photologue that you can be using and it's free. So the first thing you do is go log in or sign up so you want to join Photologue. Once you click the join button you just need to put in a democrat username you can check for availability or password, re-enter your password, email, re-enter your password, email sorry, your country as well, estate and province, city, your gender, date of birth and then the capture code verification, confirm the terms of service and also you can check this box if you want to receive other company surveys and offers from their marketing partners which is postmaster direct. If you don't want to get other emails from people outside of Photologue then I suggest that you don't check this box you leave this one blank. So once you filled out this part we move into step two. Once you filled in the details it'll say thanks you're almost done and you can now or send an email to your email address you just need to click the link and then confirm and just follow the instructions inside that email. If you don't get a validation email you can pop in your email address again and re-send it to yourself. So you check the email box and confirm your sign up. As you can see once you've confirmed your sign up in your email you click the link it will say registration complete it says thank you and the name that you used and then you can start to click to upload your photos, you can customise your Photologue page and you can also learn about becoming a Gold Camera Member if you want to as well so you can enjoy higher daily upload limits and other features within Photologue and you can also send your friends an invitation if you want to invite people to Photologue to have them start following you you can do that or we can just get started with uploading our photo and customising our page. When you click to upgrade your page you'll get basically your account info and hear like your profile and the profile you can choose to display your email or not I'd recommend you put not but about yourself and again think about this if you're going to be having a niche profile here then you want to make it related to your niche, a photo about your niche obviously put your country and state here and city. What you do you might want to again put that related to your niche and the great part here about Photologue is you can add websites with a site name and a URL and again you know site name make it anchor text that's keyword related to your niche going to your URL because this will help just with all the SEO going through the site as well remember there's over 18 million people on this site so have it keyword related again related to your niche and linking to your URL of your website and you can just add more sites as well. You can put information about your photos you can put what cameras you like you use if you want to and then you can put in things you like music, movies, sports and websites again you know if it's related to music, movies and sports your niche you want to fill this out if it's not maybe not but then put the sites that are related and again you could put affiliate links here to sites and products if you wanted to and then ready to update your member profile you just repeat your password and hit update and it fills out your profile information. In the preferences section of Photologue here you can choose your page, the background color, the text color and the hyperlink text color you can set up here. Custom title image you can only do that if you are a gold member but for now it's just setting up the color of the page, the text, privacy policy within your preferences if you like or the privacy will be add yourself to the country directory yes or no who can post your photo log guest book is it just Photologous is it only that your friends or you want to turn off your guest book and have no one post and again who can send you a photo log message is it nobody only your friends or any photo log member and again you might want to make this one any member to start with because you can interact with more people at the more chance they are going to follow you and be going on to the other sites that you recommended in your profile section and here email notifications when new friends and favorites are updated new guest book postings weekly stats you can choose them here and again you have to put in your password to update this section. Just a very quick note about Photolog Premium Membership you can upgrade if you want to and allows you to put a custom title image for your page rather than just being a normal page you can have up to six photos uploaded a day and there's no time limit on editing captions etc and there's also other features and the cost at the moment of five dollars a month or if you pay for a year it's 45 for the year you just pay by PayPal so that's the option to upgrade if you wish to. As far as uploading a photo you just hit the upload you choose and browse for a photo that's on your desktop you put the title and the caption again make all this keyword specific and relative to your niche market because it's going to help with people finding it the date and the camera if you want to you can choose a camera that was used if you've added a camera to your profile or you can just leave this one and a password and hit upload and it'll upload the photograph to your site. If you go through the discover section you can go looking through for members individually or we can go here to groups and within groups you've got all different categories and it shows you how many photographs are within a certain category which can be really useful for example look here at PhotoCats 94,000 photos animals nature there's 784 groups there you can set up your own group as well so if it's not here yet and you want to create your own group you can go ahead let's say for example we were interested in food and cooking we could go looking at the categories here on food and cooking there's 195 groups at the moment and then we can actually go through reading the information I mean as you've got here there's one on Starbucks where there's a photo log group where members around the world are posting photos where the main photos main senses of the actual photo log is Starbucks and there's over 16,000 photos so this is why if you start thinking outside of the box you could imagine if you had a group here of people sharing photos you can get a lot of people coming to your niche market and ultimately linking back to your site and you can create your own group.
